transcript.text:
(The first time ever)
(With an amazing presentation)
(A seafood extravaganza is coming)
(All hail)
(and worship)
(the steamed lobster clam pot)
That's for 10 people
Looks like a piece of cake for her
Would that be enough for her?
She ate all that herself?
Wow, she’s really the best
My aunt has never seen anyone eat like that
Tzuyang, thumbs up!
- Double thumbs up! - Thank you lol
(See you on Tzuyang this summer)
(Subway line 4, Miasageori Station)

Hello, everyone
Today I'm at Mia-dong
I was craving some seafood today
so I came here to have steamed clams
I was looking for a good steamed clam restaurant
(Lobster on steamed clams...?) and came across this place
that serves lobsters, and just looks amazing
That's why I'm here
(With a variety of clams filling the tank...) There's a tank in front like this
The scallops are huge!
('Clam Il Bunji', Dobong-ro, Gangbuk-gu)
(Let's go) Hello!
First...
I should start with the steamed lobster clam pot, right?
(Along with lobster, it comes with a variety of seafood) Looks delicious!
In addition to the lobster...

would 2 large pots be enough?
(One large is about 4 servings) It's for 4 people?
Then I'll have one...
large steamed lobster clam pot
and regular steamed clam pot with an extra lobster
(Did I hear that correctly?) Oh, okay, I'll bring it right away
(A pot full of seafood...)
(Put it to boil until it overflows...)
(Then it's ready to be served)
(A pot full of steamed lobster clams!)
(The real game beings now) Hello, your steamed lobster clam pot is here
(Amazing)
That's a lot of food
(Both the visuals and portion is crazy...) Thank you
- Enjoy your meal! - Thank you!
Wow, look at this

(They're much bigger than they look...) I can't get this fully on camera
If you look inside...
(This is a steamed 'seafood' pot!) There are also dumplings and shrimp
and a lot of clams at the bottom
It comes with this cheese pen shell, too
And also one whole octopus
The steamed lobster clam pot has an octopus
and the regular steamed clam pot has a squid
- Can I eat this right away? - Yes, you can!
(The abalone is steamed separately) You just have to cook the abalone
(The abalone is steamed separately) The abalone?
Yes, just cook those 2 pieces of abalone
(They remove the shells for you!) When you need help with the shell removal, we'll do it for you right away
Thank you
Bon appétit
Let's start with the scallops

(Plump scallops...!) Ta-da
Dip it in chojang* *Spicy-sweet red chili sauce
Wow, it's perfectly cooked
It's so good
How are the scallops so plump?
(Dip it in chojang!)
So delicious
What's this? White clam?
For this...
(White clam collector) let's scrape it all off
like this
(Gather it all up in one scallop shell!)
Then drizzle some chojang on top
Wow, it's so chewy
Let's get 2 of them
(Impressive)

Wow, so good...
What's this?
Let's try the dumplings
Remove the shrimp
(Small steamer) This steamer is so cute!
Fresh clams...
Let's remove all the shells
(A pile of fresh clams all at once!)
Wow, there's also blood clam
This one has a strong preference
It's like a slightly larger version of a cockle
However!
You can feel something bursting inside
and something sticky oozing out
That's why there's a strong preference
In my case, I love it

(Clam killer) I like all kinds of clams
The soup is also so spicy
If you look inside
there's this thing, too
Fish cakes!
Ta-da
Let's soak it in the soup!
Needless to say
Lobster!
(Brilliant...!)
There's also conch
(Hello)
Let's get the guts out
(Remove the bitter conch guts)
Can you help me remove the lobster shell?
- Do you want both of them removed? - Just one, please!

The shells are endless
Why are there so many?
There's a pile of clams hiding under the octopus!
Is this for real?
(Off to remove the shell) Okay, thank you
(They remove the lobster shell to make it easier to eat!)
(Adding cheese) Please put it on here
Thank you
(Grilled cheese goes well with savory clams) Awesome!
Amazing!
With grilled corn cheese!
What's this?
(Scallops)
I thought it was just cheese, but there are scallops inside!
(Lobster arrives) Thank you!
(Nicely peeled)

The scallops are amazing!
They did a great job of separating the lobster meat
(Hence the meat pulls off easily) Lobster should be eaten with the hands
Wow, this is crazy
Delicious hehe
Wow, the guts
(Full of meat)
It's overflowing with guts
Let's dip the meat in it
Dip it in the guts like this
It tastes so good
(Getting hyped up) with the guts!
The guts taste amazing
The owner told me to cook the abalone
(All dropped into the soup) Let's put it in
(The lobster claws are also so plump!) I got it!

My favorite today is the lobster guts
Delicious!
Let's put this grilled cheese aside
Wow, usually by this time
I have to run out of clams,
(There are still piles of it...) but they show no signs of running out!
Wow, what's this?
Look at this
(He-wwo) It's a tiny mussel!
It's so cute! It's like a mini mussel!
It's so plump!
The fish cakes are nicely cooked
Let's dip it in the sauce!
Wow, what's this? White clams?
No, I mean...
Hard clams?

Is it time to eat the octopus?
(Octopus big enough to be said as an entree...) This octopus is so big!!
This will weigh easily over a kilo!
(Getting suspicious...) Is it originally served with an octopus this huge?
(Octopus with a great plump and chewy texture!)
Look at the legs!
The more you cook it, it tastes better
So let's cook it a bit more
(In the meantime, she's collecting more shells...)
(A pile of meat)
The soup is so spicy
and refreshing
(Time for mussels)
(Takes a fortune to separate all of them...)
(To the collected pile of mussels...)
(let's add the scallops!)

Scallops!
(Ready for a spoonful of mussels...)
Mussel tower
It's nicely dissoluted
I didn't chew on any sand in the mussels
despite eating a mouthful of it
While the octopus is cooking
(Adding the chilled clams to the soup!) let's put it all in to warm it up
Clams taste best when they're moist
(She's overworking today...)
Shrimp(?) meat!
(Excessive labor is harmful to your mental health) No, I mean, clam meat haha
(Reloading her pile of clams...)
Let's taste the abalone
It's so soft!
Scallop!

Delicious!
I wanted to try separating this one myself
(Spoiled by the amazing service...) but it was so easy to eat when they did it for me
So I'll just ask them to separate it again
(See you soon) Thank you
Should I put all the clams into the soup,
and make it into a clam noodle soup?
(But the price was hard labor...) When do I finish separating all this?
My arm hurts already
(Hang in there, my biceps and triceps...)
(I'm back) Thank you!
(Filled with meat!)
(Can't waste a second) Let's start with the lobster
With chojang, obviously!
Wow, this lobster is...
quite bulked up(?)

(This lobster has been working hard...) I can feel its muscles
It's very hard
Let's dip it in the guts
This tastes amazing!
(You've eaten, so let's get back to work...)
Ugh, my arm hurts!!
Is this for real?
My aunt has been here for 13 years
(Are you a real person...?) She’s never seen someone eat like her
She even ordered an extra lobster...
That's for 10 people...
Wow...
(Automatic thumbs up)
Squid!
(Squid instead of octopus in regular steamed clams)
Scallop!

This...
This mini dumpling steamer...
(Cutie-patootie) is so cute!
(So cute that it makes you want to eat dim sum) It's quite new to me!
(3 bullets loaded) Scallop
Wow, this scallop is huge
Can I eat all 3 at once?
(Plump)
It's huge!
Let's try 3 pieces of abalone!
Wow, this abalone is so good
Octopus in the oil sauce!
Octopus tastes best
(Essential) when dipped in oil sauce
One table full of people
can't fill up the trash can like that

(But she can...) But she does that herself... It's my first time seeing it
(Adding the noodles!)
(Colorful) It's already cooked, so eat it right away
What noodles do you use?
(Handmade tricolored noodles) It's tricolored noodles
Compared to other people,
I eat 10 to 20x more clams...
So if I eat this much...
wouldn't I find a pearl one day?
(In your dreams)
Squid legs, squid legs
(Squid legs are the best)
The squid tastes better than the octopus
(The noodles already got soggy...) I thought I had to cook it...
It was already cooked
(That friend who don't know they had homework.mov)

(She wasn't focusing) What noodles do you use?
(How Koreans speak.mov) I thought, like, the orange noodles, like...
would taste like vegetables... haha
But not at all, it's delicious
So delicious
(A plate full of clams and noodles)
Let's top it off with kimchi
On you go
Let's eat it with the squid this time
Clam noodles!
Ta-da
(Half clams, half noodles) Look at that
(Where's all this Coke from...?) Among the...
steamed clams I had...
(That was the best steamed clams ever...) this place has the biggest portion
I've never had such endless steamed clams

(A thumbs up out of nowhere) I looked to the side and found him... lol
I was surprised to see him suddenly putting his thumb up
I work at the hotel here
If you visit, the buffet will close(?) down...
Wow, is that a Coke tower...?
(A pile of Coke...) Coke tower!
(The steamed clams are gone...)
(Your deserve this plum beverage) Thank you!
(I enjoyed it cold in the car hehe) I'll take it and drink in the car later
Thanks so much
Last bite!
(Complete)
(8 cans of Coke)
Tzuyang, thumbs up!
- Double thumbs up! - Thank you
You finished it?!

- You ate it all up!! - I really enjoyed the meal
(Amazed by the inhaled Coke...) Did you drink that much Coke?
Thanks for the meal today
